name: Inphi Corporation
description: Inphi Corporation is a provider of high-speed analog and mixed-signal semiconductor solutions for the communications, data center, and computing markets. The company's solutions facilitate the transmission of high-speed data between systems and within systems, addressing bandwidth bottlenecks in networks. Inphi's products include analog and mixed-signal integrated circuits that perform signal conditioning, amplification, and other functions, enabling high-speed data transmission over optical and copper links.
